chunks.section: Admission through TNEA Counselling & Eligibility for Other State Students
chunks.context: Explains the TNEA counselling process for B.E/B.Tech admission and the eligibility formula and contact for students from other states.
chunks.text:
ADMISSION THROUGH TNEA COUNSELLING

Students who have completed Plus 2 / Diploma may apply for Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA Counselling) for B.E / B.Tech programmes admission conducted by Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE), Chennai.

For More Details Please Visit:
TNEA: https://tneaonline.org/
DoTE: http://www.tndte.gov.in/site/
Anna University: https://www.annauniv.edu/

ELIGIBILITY FOR STUDENTS FROM OTHER STATES
(Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Kerala and all Northern States)

Selection of candidates will be based on the qualifying marks (Q) obtained in Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry at the Plus Two or Intermediate level. The qualifying marks (Q) are calculated as follows:

Q = (Mathematics / 2) + ((Physics + Chemistry) / 4)

where M, P, and C represent the percentage marks in Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry, respectively.

For Admission (Students from Other States):
For assistance, students can contact Dr. Vamsi Naga Mohan .A, who can communicate in Telugu, Tamil, Malayalam and Hindi.

Contact Numbers: 9043358674, 9502687344
Email: cse.vamsi@msajce-edu.in

chunks.section: B.E / B.Tech Eligibility — HSC Academic, HSC Vocational & Lateral Entry
chunks.context: Detailed community-wise minimum eligibility marks for B.E/B.Tech admission via HSC Academic, HSC Vocational, and Lateral Entry (Diploma/B.Sc.) routes.
chunks.text:
B.E / B.TECH — ADMISSION ELIGIBILITY

B.E. / B.Tech. Degree Programmes (4 Years)

HSC (ACADEMIC)
A pass in the HSC (Academic) or its equivalent with a minimum average percentage in Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry put together as given below:

S.No. | Community | Minimum Average Marks in Maths, Physics & Chemistry
1 | General Category | 45.00%
2 | Backward Class including Backward Class Muslim | 40.00%
3 | MBC & DNC | 40.00%
4 | SC / SCA / ST | 40.00%

HSC (VOCATIONAL)
A pass in any one of the HSC (Vocational subject) with any one of the Engineering related subjects namely Mathematics, Physics or Chemistry with a minimum average percentage put together:

S.No. | Community | Minimum Average Marks in related subjects, Vocational Theory & Practicals
1 | General Category | 45.00%
2 | Backward Class including Backward Class Muslim | 40.00%
3 | MBC & DNC | 40.00%
4 | SC / SCA / ST | 40.00%

DIRECT SECOND YEAR B.E./B.TECH. (LATERAL ENTRY) DEGREE COURSES

Qualifying Examination — Diploma Candidates:
A pass with prescribed minimum eligibility marks in any one of the Diploma in appropriate branch of Engineering / Technology of the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Tamil Nadu / equivalent prescribed for admission to the Degree Course.

Qualifying Examination — B.Sc. Candidates:
A pass with prescribed minimum eligibility marks in any recognized Bachelor's Degree in Science of minimum 3 years duration with 10+2+3 years pattern and studied core Mathematics as one of the subjects at degree level.
Note: Candidates with Degree other than Bachelor of Science are not eligible.

For any clarification with regard to Diploma qualification, write a letter to DOTE, get it clarified and then admit students. On any account, candidates without prescribed qualifications will not be given admission approval.

Minimum Eligibility Marks — Lateral Entry (Diploma & B.Sc.):
As per G.O. (Ms.) No.263, Higher Education (J2) Department, dated: 30.6.2008 and Government Letter No.5464 / J1 / 2011-1, Higher Education Department, dated: 4.7.2011

S.No. | Community | Minimum Average Marks
1 | General Category | 55.00%
2 | Backward Class including Backward Class Muslim | 50.00%
3 | MBC & DNC | 45.00%
4 | SC / SCA / ST | Mere pass in the qualifying examination for Diploma / B.Sc. Degree / Equivalent

Note: When the candidates produce grade certificate, they have to produce the actual marks also; otherwise only the minimum marks applicable to the grades in the subjects will be taken into account.

chunks.context: Specifies the eligibility qualifications for M.E./M.Tech. programmes in CSE and Structural Engineering, and Ph.D in Mechanical Engineering including CGPA requirements.
chunks.text:
M.E / M.TECH — ADMISSION ELIGIBILITY

M.E. / M.Tech. Degree Programmes (2 Years)

S.No. | PG Programme | Qualifications for Admission
1 | M.E. (Computer Science and Engineering) | B.E. / B.Tech. (EEE / ECE / CSE / IT / I&C / E&I / IT / Electronics / Instrumentation) OR M.C.A.* or M.Sc. 5 years integrated (IT / CSE / Software Engg.)* (10+2+3+3 years pattern)
2 | M.E. (Structural Engineering) | B.E. Degree in Civil

For M.E. Courses, students are admitted by the college as per Government rules and regulations on the basis of the marks obtained by the candidates in their qualifying examinations. The candidates can be admitted through the Tamil Nadu Common Entrance Test (TANCET) conducted by Anna University.

Ph.D — MECHANICAL ENGINEERING — ADMISSION ELIGIBILITY

1.1 Master's Degree or any other qualification recognized as equivalent thereto in the fields of study notified from time to time by Anna University.

S.No. | Programme | Qualification for Admission
1 | Ph.D Degree in Mechanical Engineering | M.E./M.Tech./M.S. (By Research) in the relevant branch of Engineering or Technology

Note: Candidates should have the required qualification in the order of studies: 10th, HSC, UG/PG degree or its equivalent qualification.

1.2 Bachelor's Degree in Engineering / Technology with a minimum of 15 years of R & D Experience in National Research Laboratories / Public sector undertakings and with minimum of three publications in referred impact factor journals or two approved international patents in the last five years.

1.3 A minimum of 55% marks or CGPA of 5.5 on a 10 point scale in the qualifying examination.
In case of SC/ST / Differently-Abled candidates: 50% marks or CGPA of 5.0 on a 10 point scale.

rows: B.E./B.Tech. (EEE/ECE/CSE/IT/I&C/E&I/Electronics/Instrumentation) or M.C.A.* or M.Sc. 5yr integrated (IT/CSE/Software Engg)*
M.E./M.Tech./M.S. (By Research) in relevant branch of Engineering or Technology

chunks.context: Details all Skill Development Courses (Model 1 and Model 2) offered at MSAJCE including sector, job role, intake, NSQF level, and duration in hours.
chunks.text:
SKILL DEVELOPMENT COURSE — ADMISSION

MODEL 1:

S.No. | Sector/Course Basket | Job Roll | Approved Intake | NSQF Level | No. of Hours
1 | Computer Science and Engineering | Computer Hardware Network Maintenance | 30 | Level 4 | 1600
2 | Mechanical Engineering | Refrigeration And Air Conditioning Technician | 30 | Level 5 | 3200

MODEL 2:

S.No. | Sector/Course Basket | Job Roll | Approved Intake | NSQF Level | No. of Hours
1 | Computer Science and Engineering | AI - Machine Learning Developer | 30 | Level 7 | 756
2 | Mechanical Engineering | Refrigeration And Air Conditioning Technician | 30 | Level 5 | 3200
3 | Mechanical Engineering | Additive Manufacturing Technician (3D Printing) (CTS) | 30 | Level 4 | 2080
4 | Electronics Engineering | Certificate Course in Embedded System Design using ARM/Cortex Microcontroller | 30 | Level 5 | 80
5 | Architecture Engineering | Architectural Drafting and Basic 3D Design with Autodesk Revit (MES) | 30 | Level 4 | 500

Online Application Form: https://enrollonline.co.in/Registration/Apply/MSAJCE

chunks.context: Comprehensive list of scholarships available to B.E/B.Tech students at MSAJCE including scheme names, eligibility criteria, funding agencies, amounts, and number of scholarships.
chunks.text:
B.E / B.TECH SCHOLARSHIPS

Name of the Scheme | Eligibility | Funding Agency | Scholarship Amount (Rs.) | No. of Scholarships for Tamil Nadu
Pragati Scholarship Scheme for Girl Students | Max two girl children per family; Income less than 8 Lakh per annum | AICTE | Rs. 50,000 per year | 800
Saksham Scholarship Scheme for Specially Abled Students | Having disability not less than 40%; Income less than 8 Lakh per annum | AICTE | Rs. 50,000 per year | All Eligible Candidates
Merit cum Means Based Scholarship (Minority Community only) | 50% marks in final examination; Income less than 2.5 Lakh per annum | Ministry of Minority Affairs | Rs. 20,000 per year + Rs. 12,000 for Hostellers / Rs. 6,000 for Day Scholars | 1075 for Muslim, 1173 for Christian
Central Sector Scheme | 80% marks in final examination; Income less than 8 Lakh per annum | MHRD | Rs. 10,000 per year | 4883
Financial Assistance for Education to the wards of Beedi/Mine/Cine workers | Income less than Rs. 10,000 per month | Ministry of Labour & Employment | Rs. 15,000 per year | All Eligible Candidates

AICTE Scholarship / Fellowship Schemes: https://www.aicte.gov.in/schemes/students-development-schemes
Online Application Form: https://enrollonline.co.in/Registration/Apply/MSAJCE
